title: Ventura County SFR — Type V-B, code-analysis sheet missing required fields
notes: GEN-CODE-ANALYSIS should fail — sheet omits occupant load + IECC path. Tests negative finding generation in a Ventura context.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 1188 RIDGELINE DR, VENTURA COUNTY (SIMI VALLEY area)
A-0.1 PROJECT DATA
Occupancy Group: R-3
Construction Type: V-B
Number of stories: 2
Building height: 22 ft
Total building area: 2,400 sf
Per-story area: 1,200 sf
Sprinklered: yes (NFPA 13D)
WC 3, LAV 3
EXIT 1 (front), EXIT 2 (rear)
Smoke alarms NFPA 72
Electrical service 200 A
No Title 24 Part 6 compliance path called out. Occupant load not stated.

ground_truth.rationale: Code-analysis sheet omits occupant load and IECC compliance path
Occupant load not declared on plans
Title 24 Part 6 compliance path not declared
